channel.title: News on Schwartz Lab
channel.description: Recent content in News on Schwartz Lab

item.title: Christie presents at the DSI Student-Led Reproducibility Challenge
item.description: Christie presents at the DSI Student-Led Reproducibility Challenge.

item.title: The Schwartz Lab receives support from the DSI Research Software Development Support Program
item.description: The Schwartz lab receives support from the Data Science Institute Research Software Development Support Program. Featured in: https://datasciences.utoronto.ca/advancing-data-science-discovery-via-software-development-support/

item.title: Christie Lau joins the lab!
item.description: Christie Lau from the Department of Medical Biophysics joins the lab.

item.title: The Schwartz Lab receives the CCS Challenge Grant
item.description: The Schwartz lab receives the Canadian Cancer Society Challenge Grant with Catherine O’Brien to study drug-tolerant persisters.

item.title: Viet Hoang joins the lab as a Bioinformatics Analyst!
item.description: Viet Hoang joins the lab as a Bioinformatics Analyst, welcome!

item.title: Yuan Chang joins the lab as a rotation student!
item.description: Yuan Chang from the Department of Medical Biophysics joins the lab.

item.title: Christie Lau joins the lab as a rotation student!
item.description: Christie Lau from the Department of Medical Biophysics joins the lab.

item.title: Lab opening
item.description: The lab is opening in October! Join our team to help develop new methods and algorithms to help us understand treatment-resistance in cancer and create new computational tools to improve diagnosis and guide therapy. We are accepting applications for all levels, from graduate student to postdoctoral fellow, as well as software engineers and bioinformaticians.
